creator: yasu@freebsd.org
text:
Build of ports-mgmt/pkg fails when 8.4-RELEASE jail is used.

yasu@eastasia[63861]% uname -a
FreeBSD eastasia.home.utahime.org 10.1-RELEASE FreeBSD 10.1-RELEASE #0 r274373: Sun Nov 16 02:14:26 JST 2014     root@eastasia.home.utahime.org:/usr0/freebsd/src/obj/usr0/freebsd/src/releng_10_1/src/sys/EASTASIA  amd64
yasu@eastasia[63862]% pkg info -E poudriere-devel
poudriere-devel-3.1.r2
yasu@eastasia[63863]% poudriere jail -l
JAILNAME VERSION         ARCH  METHOD TIMESTAMP           PATH
101amd64 10.1-RELEASE    amd64 ftp    2014-11-30 17:37:36 /usr/local/poudriere/jails/101amd64
84amd64  8.4-RELEASE-p19 amd64 ftp    2014-11-30 17:36:14 /usr/local/poudriere/jails/84amd64
93amd64  9.3-RELEASE-p5  amd64 ftp    2014-11-30 17:37:16 /usr/local/poudriere/jails/93amd64
yasu@eastasia[63864]% sudo poudriere bulk -j 84amd64 ports-mgmt/pkg
Password:
[00:00:00] ====>> Creating the reference jail... done
[00:00:00] ====>> Mounting system devices for 84amd64-default
[00:00:00] ====>> Mounting ports/packages/distfiles
[00:00:00] ====>> Stashing existing package repository
[00:00:00] ====>> Mounting packages from: /usr/local/poudriere/data/packages/84amd64-default
[00:00:00] ====>> Appending to make.conf: /usr/local/etc/poudriere.d/make.conf
/etc/resolv.conf -> /usr/local/poudriere/data/.m/84amd64-default/ref/etc/resolv.conf
[00:00:00] ====>> Starting jail 84amd64-default
[00:00:01] ====>> Logs: /usr/local/poudriere/data/logs/bulk/84amd64-default/2014-12-01_10h20m37s
[00:00:01] ====>> WWW: http://www.home.utahime.org/poudriere//build.html?mastername=84amd64-default&build=2014-12-01_10h20m37s
[00:00:01] ====>> Loading MOVED
[00:00:02] ====>> Calculating ports order and dependencies
[00:00:03] ====>> pkg package missing, skipping sanity
[00:00:03] ====>> Skipping incremental rebuild and repository sanity checks
[00:00:03] ====>> Cleaning the build queue
[00:00:03] ====>> Recording filesystem state for prepkg... done
[00:00:05] ====>> Building 1 packages using 1 builders
[00:00:05] ====>> Starting/Cloning builders
[00:00:06] ====>> Hit CTRL+t at any time to see build progress and stats
[00:00:06] ====>> [01][00:00:00] Starting build of ports-mgmt/pkg
[00:04:29] ====>> [01][00:04:23] Saved ports-mgmt/pkg wrkdir to: /usr/local/poudriere/data/wrkdirs/84amd64-default/default/pkg-1.3.8_3.txz
[00:04:29] ====>> [01][00:04:23] Finished build of ports-mgmt/pkg: Failed: package
[00:04:30] ====>> Stopping 1 builders
[00:04:31] ====>> No package built, but repository needs to be created
[00:04:31] ====>> Creating pkgng repository
[00:04:31] ====>> Error: Unable to extract pkg.
[00:04:31] ====>> Cleaning up
[00:04:31] ====>> Umounting file systems
yasu@eastasia[63865]%

If ports-mgmt/poudriere is used instead, build succeeds without any
error.

yasu@rolling-vm-freebsd1[63902]% uname -a
FreeBSD rolling-vm-freebsd1.home.utahime.org 10.1-RELEASE FreeBSD 10.1-RELEASE #0 r274373: Fri Nov 28 20:23:37 JST 2014     root@rolling-vm-freebsd1.home.utahime.org:/usr0/freebsd/src/obj/am/eastasia/usr0/freebsd/src/releng/10.1/sys/STATIC_ZFS  amd64
yasu@rolling-vm-freebsd1[63903]% pkg info -E poudriere
poudriere-3.0.19
yasu@rolling-vm-freebsd1[63904]% sudo poudriere bulk -j 84amd64 ports-mgmt/pkg
Password:
====>> Creating the reference jail... done
====>> Mounting system devices for 84amd64-default
====>> Mounting ports/packages/distfiles
====>> Mounting packages from: /usr/local/poudriere/data/packages/84amd64-default
